news.headline: Hexa appoints GTA in Guam as U.S. Landing Party for MYUS cable system; set for service by mid-2028. Connecting Malaysia and U.S. for the first time, increasing digital services access.
news.summary: Hexa Capital Consultancy PLT, the owner of the Malaysia-U.S. ("MYUS") cable located in Malaysia, has selected GTA in Guam as its U.S. Landing Party for the MYUS cable system. The MYUS cable project is scheduled for completion by mid-2028 and will establish a direct high-capacity fiberoptic connection between Malaysia and the U.S. This initiative aims to improve access to dependable and cost-effective digital services throughout Southeast Asia.

news.headline: Equinor to start $1.6 billion share buy-back program on 25th October 2024, fourth tranche for the year.
news.summary: Equinor (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) is set to start the last phase of its share buy-back program for 2024 on October 25th, 2024. This final tranche will involve repurchasing shares worth up to USD 1.6 billion. The announcement was made in connection with the release of the third quarter results on October 24th, 2024.

news.headline: Equinor reported $6.89B adjusted operating income, $2.04B after tax in Q3 2024, with net income at $2.29B. Adjusted EPS at $0.79.
news.summary: Equinor, listed on both OSE and NYSE as EQNR, announced impressive financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company achieved an adjusted operating income of USD 6.89 billion, with a post-tax income of USD 2.04 billion. Equinor's net operating income stood at USD 6.91 billion, resulting in a net income of USD 2.29 billion. The adjusted net income totaled USD 2.19 billion, translating to adjusted earnings per share of USD 0.79.

news.headline: Teck's unaudited Q3 results show growth in copper production and $1.3 billion returned to shareholders in 2024.
news.summary: Copper production has shown sustained growth this year, with over $1.3 billion being distributed to shareholders.

news.headline: Equinor ASA to pay cash dividend for Q3 2024. (Ticker: EQNR)
news.summary: Important details regarding the cash dividend payment by Equinor ASA (OSE: EQNR, NYSE: EQNR) for the third quarter of 2024 have been released. Shareholders of the company will receive a dividend payout for this quarter. Equinor ASA, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EQNR and on the New York Stock Exchange under the same symbol, has finalized the dividend amount which stands at [INSERT DIVIDEND AMOUNT]. This payment is indicative of the company's financial performance during the mentioned quarter and adds to the overall returns for its shareholders.

news.headline: J INTS BIO shares interim findings of JIN-A02 Phase 1/2 trial in NSCLC, promising breakthrough against acquired resistance.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on October 24, 2024, J INTS BIO, a leading biopharmaceutical firm, announced encouraging interim findings from the Phase 1/2 clinical study of its innovative 4th-generation EGFR Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitor, JIN-A02. The medication is designed for EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer patients.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals buys gold stream from Montage Gold's Koné Gold Project in a deal announced on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 23, 2024, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. shared exciting news regarding its subsidiary, Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. (WPMI). The company has officially signed a definitive Precious Metals Purchase Agreement. The agreement, which involves the purchase of gold, illustrates Wheaton's commitment to the precious metals industry. This strategic move highlights the company's dedication to growth and development in this sector.

news.headline: Lebanese military: Israeli attack results in deaths of three soldiers
South Korean Finance Minister Choi Sang-mok speaks in a meeting
S. Korea: 3Q GDP growth falls short of expectations, Choi says
Saviynt launches Saviynt University in India to address cybersecurity skills gap, offering training and certifications.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, the renowned provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, Saviynt, has launched the highly anticipated Saviynt University, now accessible to the public in India. This initiative presents tailored training and certification courses covering the complete suite of Saviynt products, equipping both individuals and enterprises with the essential expertise to safeguard the digital landscape. India is grappling with a notable scarcity of cybersecurity experts, with a roughly estimated shortfall of one million professionals in the field.

news.headline: Montage Gold secures US$825m financing for Koné project in Côte d'Ivoire, increasing liquidity to US$968m.
news.summary: A substantial financing package worth US$825 million has been successfully obtained from strategic partners Wheaton Precious Metals and Zijin Mining. This funding will support the development of the Koné project located in Côte d'Ivoire. After securing this financing, Montage now has access to a total liquidity of US$968 million, which includes cash reserves. Wheaton Precious Metals is set to contribute US$625 million towards this initiative.

news.headline: Investors worried about GOP winning all branches of gov't, causing uncertainty in bond markets.
Xi Jinping urges BRICS members for high-quality development in cooperation for Global South rise.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping urged members of the BRICS alliance to align with the increasing prominence of the Global South and engage in the BRICS cooperation mechanism. He emphasized the importance of actively responding to the collective goal of joining the group. The statement highlights the significance of participating in the collaboration, which includes Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa.

news.headline: Horizon Robotics (HKEX: 9660) lists on Hong Kong Stock Exchange, specializing in ADAS and AD solutions for vehicles.
news.summary: Today, in Hong Kong on October 24, 2024, Horizon Robotics (stock symbol: 9660) officially debuted on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. Horizon Robotics is a prominent company offering sophisticated driver assistance systems (ADAS) and self-driving (AD) technology for passenger cars.

news.headline: Chinese investments are set to boost Hong Kong's wealth management sector. Stay tuned. #HongKong #wealthmanagement
European airlines face rising costs due to avoiding Russian airspace; economic slowdown and geopolitical tensions impact business travel to China.
news.summary: European airlines are facing increased expenses due to the need to bypass Russian airspace. Alongside, the European economy's slow pace and geopolitical conflicts are significantly impacting business travel to China. These challenges have led to a noticeable rise in operational costs for carriers, as well as a decrease in corporate travel to the East Asian country.

news.headline: Plug and Play launches accelerator program in Albania with Albanian-American Development Foundation's support.
news.summary: In Tirana, Albania on October 24, 2024, Plug and Play, a prominent global innovation platform operating in more than 60 locations globally, unveiled the introduction of a novel program. This initiative is made possible through backing from the Albanian-American Development Foundation, in partnership with various stakeholders.

news.headline: Sociaaal secures $4M funding from Braavo Capital to fuel Gen Z app growth and expand their portfolio.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Sociaaal, a rapidly expanding mobile app studio catering to Gen Z with non-gaming apps, disclosed securing $4 million in funding from Braavo Capital. The investment is intended to support the company's initiatives in...

news.headline: Animal Dermatology Group grows to over 90 doctors through acquisitions in Maryland, Tennessee, Florida, and California. Expansion key in U.S. markets.
news.summary: An expansion in key locations has been initiated by Animal Dermatology Group with recent acquisitions in Maryland, Tennessee, Florida, and California. In Newport Beach, California, on October 24, 2024, Animal Dermatology Group, Inc. ("ADG") confirmed the acquisition of four dermatology specialty practices.

news.headline: 74% of companies face challenges in achieving and scaling AI value. Fintech, software, and banking lead in AI adoption.
news.summary: A recent study by BCG reveals that Fintech, Software, and Banking industries have the highest number of AI pioneers. The study, conducted in Boston, indicates that CEOs in these sectors are heavily investing in AI, hiring skilled professionals, and implementing AI programs. This research, dated October 24, 2024, highlights the significant focus on AI adoption in these industries.

news.headline: Home equity gains stable as U.S. housing market cools in Q3 2024. Nearly half of mortgaged homeowners equity-rich. Owners seriously underwater close to 5-year low.
news.summary: Nearly 50% of homeowners with mortgages are considered equity-rich, signifying a significant level of ownership stake in their properties. Conversely, the percentage of homeowners who are seriously underwater remains at a near five-year low. The data, released by ATTOM, a prominent collector of property information and real estate analytics, shows positive trends for U.S. homeowners. This Q3 2024 report from Irvine, California, suggests that while a substantial number of mortgage holders have ample equity in their homes, a small proportion are still struggling with negative equity.

news.headline: Holzmann from ECB Governing Council discusses in interview
Holzmann sees slim chance of December rate cut
Holzmann suggests ECB may hold in December due to October move
ECB's Holzmann predicts quarter-point rate cut in December
Holzmann warns of possibility of stronger-than-expected inflation
Xsolla releases Parental Controls solution certified with COPPA and GDPRkids™ for game developers, ensuring secure transactions for young gamers.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a global video game commerce company, Xsolla, has unveiled its Parental Controls solution, now certified with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule (COPPA) and GDPRkids™ Privacy Assured badges. Xsolla's upgraded Parental Controls provide game developers with a comprehensive system to protect young gamers. It empowers parents to monitor and regulate their children's digital payment interactions, guaranteeing safe transactions. The company aims to assist developers in adopting this feature to enhance child safety online.

news.headline: Calumet begins exchange offer for 11.00% Senior Notes due 2025, announces support agreement.
news.summary: Today, in Indianapolis, Calumet, Inc. revealed that its fully owned subsidiaries, Calumet Specialty Products Partners, L.P. and Calumet Finance Corp., made significant strides. Calumet, traded as NASDAQ: CLMT, shared this news on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Calumet (NASDAQ: CLMT) releases preliminary Q3 2024 financial results; key numbers to be disclosed soon.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on October 23, 2024, Calumet, Inc. disclosed preliminary financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2024. Operating under NASDAQ as CLMT, the company anticipates certain figures based on initial data. The finalized results are yet to be released but offer insight into the company's performance last quarter.

news.headline: CEO of Ripple admits not engaging with regulators sooner was a mistake, aims to make up for lost time now.
news.summary: The CEO of Ripple, Brad Garlinghouse, believes the company should have initiated discussions with US regulators much sooner. He acknowledged that they are now making efforts to catch up on lost time in engaging with regulators.

news.headline: Harris to attend Georgia rally on Thursday
El Salvador's President Bukele donates 2 BTC to fund 1,000 schools in Honduras through charity run, touching moment captured.
news.summary: El president of El Salvador, Nayib Bukele, made a donation of 2 BTC to philanthropist Shin Fujiyama to aid in the construction of schools in Honduras. Stacy Herbert, the Director of El Salvador's National Bitcoin Office, shared the news on Wednesday. A video accompanying the announcement shows an appreciative Fujiyama expressing his thanks to President Bukele. This act is part of efforts to build 1000 schools in Honduras.

news.headline: Indian bond exchange traded funds (ETFs) expected to attract billions as Amundi and BlackRock enter the market.
Boeing union members refuse latest offer, stay on strike.
Pylontech named Tier 1 Global Energy Storage Manufacturer by BloombergNEF, confirming top status in industry.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 23, 2024, Pylontech (ticker symbol: 688063:SHH) received prestigious recognition as a Tier 1 Global Energy Storage Manufacturer from BloombergNEF, reinforcing its standing as a key player in the worldwide energy storage sector. This accolade, awarded by the respected and strategic organization BNEF, highlights Pylontech's industry prowess and signifies its high rank within the global energy storage market.

news.headline: McDonald's stock dropped due to E. coli outbreak tied to Quarter Pounders; slivered onions recall issued.
news.summary: Shares of McDonald's experienced a decline following the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention connecting an E. coli outbreak to their Quarter Pounder burgers. On Wednesday night, a recall was initiated specifically for slivered onions. The incident was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Boeing workers reject 35% pay raise after company reported a big loss; machinists union votes against the hike.
news.summary: Boeing employees who went on strike decided against a proposed 35% salary increase, as confirmed by the machinists union on Wednesday evening. This decision follows a substantial financial loss reported by the aerospace company Dow Jones.

news.headline: Euronet Worldwide, a financial solutions and payments provider (NASDAQ: EEFT), reports Q3 2024 results in Leawood.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Euronet Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ: EEFT), a prominent financial technology solutions and payments provider based in Leawood, Kansas, announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: CEO discusses Defense and AI opportunities on Bloomberg.
After surpassing $67,000, Bitcoin stabilizes amid a 'liquidity hunt' surge. Experts foresee a $70,000 retest, driven by U.S. election and NFP data.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin remains stable above $67,000, with analysts forecasting a potential reevaluation to $70,000. Market sentiment is being influenced by the U.S. election and the upcoming Non-Farm Payrolls data release.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin prices decline; Bitcoin at $66,584.09, Ethereum at $2,515.92, Dogecoin at $0.1384. Cryptocurrency liquidations reached $277 million in 24 hours, Bitcoin's Open Interest dropped 0.87%, Ethereum down by 1.15%.
news.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies, like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin, experienced losses amidst a broader market sell-off. Bitcoin saw a 1.54% drop to $66,584.09, while Ethereum fell by 4.50% to $2,515.92, and Dogecoin declined by 1.84% to $0.1384. Bitcoin hit a low of $65,188, and Ethereum dropped below $2,500 for the first time in nearly 10 days. Total liquidations in the cryptocurrency market amounted to over $277 million in the last 24 hours, with $203 million in upside bets wiped out. Bitcoin's dominance increased over the week, impacting Ethereum and other altcoins. Despite this, more traders were longing Bitcoin than those betting against it. Bitcoin's Open Interest fell by 0.87%, and Ethereum experienced a 1.15% decline in unsettled contract funds.

news.headline: J INTS BIO shares interim results of JIN-001 in refractory ovarian cancer at ENA Symposium in Spain. Second-generation HSP90 inhibitor shows promise.
news.summary: South Korea's J INTS BIO, a prominent player in oncology drug research, recently shared preliminary preclinical findings of their latest synthetic HSP90 inhibitor, JIN-001, during the ENA Symposium in Barcelona, Spain. The event took place from October 23 to October 25, 2024.

news.headline: Lawsuit claims Character.ai's chatbot led to 14-year-old's death by suicide after alleged sexual content; lawsuit filed on Oct. 22.
news.summary: A lawsuit filed on October 22 alleges that a 14-year-old boy had a final interaction with a Character.ai chatbot before he tragically took his own life by shooting himself in the head in February.

news.headline: RBNZ Governor Orr urges public to study meeting records in detail.
Japanese logistics company Nippon Express explores acquiring companies in India. #businessnews
S&P: China program to swap to put pressure on brokerage capital ratios
Boeing workers turn down contract after company's $6.1B loss, prolonging strike at plane manufacturing sites.
news.summary: Following Boeing's announcement of a significant $6.1 billion loss, workers have voted to extend a month-long strike at the factories responsible for producing the company's top-selling commercial airplane.

news.headline: ZTE hosts Broadband User Congress 2024 in Mexico City to empower collaboration on broadband technology.
news.summary: In Mexico City on October 23, 2024, ZTE Corporation (0763.HK / 000063.SZ), a prominent global provider of information and communication technology solutions, initiated the Broadband User Congress 2024. The event took place in Mexico City, Mexico.

news.headline: Harris to Speak in Clarkston, Georgia at 7:00 pm ET
